SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Continued To Mar-14-08 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Judge David Ballati, Dept 504. Clerk: B. Wilber. Nothing on record
11:15am
Mr. Michael Lawrence appears in Court; Mr. Damien Dillon appears by phone. Judge Ballati speaks to Mr. Dillon by phone (408-772-7200), and to Mr. Lawrence in the courtroom. Mr. Dillon was unable to make it to the hearing. Mr. Lawrence and Mr. Dillon told Judge Ballati they thought they had a settlement, but wanted it put in writing.

Judge Ballati advised the parties that the Court did not have the resources to help prepare the documents, and advised them to seek legal advice or try to put something together themselves. Judge Ballati suggested the prepare a Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and a Judgment.

The matter is continued to March 14, 2008, 11:00AM, Dept. 206. Clerk ordered to send continuance notice.
